notFound.title: 404 – Page Not Found
notFound.message: The requested page does not exist.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You do not have permission to view this page.

errors.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.clientError: The request could not be processed.
errors.networkError: No connection to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.resourceNotFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.conflict: The record has been modified. Please reload the data.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
